title: Aggregated agent stats
description: Single source of truth for per-agent install counts and (later) ratings. Owned by the openagents-stats[bot] account; humans never edit it directly. The renderer fetches this file once on Hub open and caches.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by the bot on every flush. Lets the renderer show staleness when needed.

installs.description: Total lifetime installs across all clients.

installs7d.description: Installs in the trailing 7 days. Reset by the cron handler.

discussionUrl.description: Permalink to the GitHub Discussion thread for this agent. Optional until Discussions ship.

comments.description: Comment count on the Discussion. Optional until Discussions ship.

reactions.description: Reaction counts on the Discussion, keyed by reaction name (`+1`, `heart`, etc.). Optional until Discussions ship.
